components.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950 flex flex-col gap-2 p-4
components.tables: w-full text-sm text-left. Header: bg-zinc-900 text-zinc-400 font-medium. Rows: border-b border-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-800/50 transition-colors

buttons.primary: bg-amber-500 hover:bg-amber-600 text-black font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-700 hover:border-zinc-600 text-zinc-300 hover:text-zinc-100 rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent hover:bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-400 hover:text-zinc-100 rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors

components.inputs: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-zinc-100 placeholder:text-zinc-600 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-amber-500/50
components.logs_viewer: bg-[#050505] border border-zinc-800 rounded-md p-4 font-mono text-xs sm:text-sm text-amber-500/90 overflow-y-auto h-64 sm:h-96

images.description: Dreamlike moonlit mountain landscape for the active campaign header or server status card. MUST use heavy overlay: bg-black/60 to bg-black/80 to ensure text contrast.
Misty forest pathway for lore/NPC empty states to give a dark, narrative feel. Keep opacity low (10-20%) and use grayscale or blend-luminosity.

icons.style: stroke-width 1.5, minimal, neutral colors unless indicating status

motion.hover_effects: Subtle background lightening (bg-zinc-800/50) and text brightening (text-white). No heavy scaling/bouncing.

accessibility.contrast: Strict AA compliance. Ensure text over images has text-shadow or heavy backdrop.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, dialog triggers) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='create-npc-submit').

instructions_to_main_agent: Prioritize function and density. This is a Game Master's command center, so pack information tightly but legibly using the 'Control Room' grid (Mode B).
CRITICAL: Do NOT use purple (#9D4CDD) or teal (#1B93A4) anywhere in the UI. Use the provided Amber (#F59E0B) as the primary accent against Zinc/Obsidian backgrounds.
CRITICAL: Do not use Inter or generic sans for headings. Use Manrope for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body. Use JetBrains Mono for logs/terminals.
Use Shadcn UI components extensively, but customize them to remove heavy rounded corners. Stick to `rounded-md` (max 6px) or `rounded-sm` for a sharp, technical look.
The 'Event Log/Journal Viewer' MUST feel like a technical terminal. Use the `logs_viewer` component styles defined above (deep black background, monospace amber/green text).
Include a sticky sidebar navigation on desktop for quick switching between Campaign, NPCs, Lore, Rules, and Logs.
Ensure all buttons, inputs, and clickable items have explicit `hover` and `focus` states with high contrast changes.
No authentication UI is required. The dashboard should assume admin access by default based on the problem statement.
